titleStmt.title: SII 26.341: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 341. (A.R. No. 322 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Tirupurāntakēśvara temple.
This inscription is built in the middle.

It records a gift of a sandhi lamp to the temple of the god (name lost) of Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr, by Vēśāli Mādāṇḍāṉ Pāriśēriyāṇḍāḷ (?) who also endowed 10 paṇam for this purpose. This money was received by a number of Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple having right of worship there, such as Tavarāśa-bhaṭṭaṉ, his sons [Poṉ]ṉambalakkūtta-bhaṭṭaṉ and Tāḻi-bhaṭṭaṉ and Tiruvallanāyaka-bhaṭṭaṉ, Ulagāḷuḍaiyāṉ[bhaṭṭaṉ], and Poṟkōyil Nambi Śōmaśrīdēvaṉ, all of whom had agreed to burn the lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvicaiyaka varkku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu kūvamāṉa tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiya ṉārkku Ivvūr vecāli mātāṇṭāṉ pāriceriyāṇṭāḷ vaitta vai
cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukku paṇam pattu Ippaṇa koyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇaṉ tavarācapaṭṭaṉ piḷḷai ṉampalakkūttapaṭṭaṉ tāḻippaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum tiru
vallanāyakapaṭṭaṉ Ulakāḷuṭaiyāṉ poṟkoyilnampi coma śrītevaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṇam tirātittavarai Iccantiviḷakku Erikkakkaṭavom Iv
vaṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai tavarācapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai poṉṉampalakūt Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvallanāyakapaṭṭaṉ Ulakāḷuṭaiyāṉ pa poṟkoyil nampi coma vaṉ Eḻuttu svastiśrī .
Digital edition of SII 26.341 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
